description: Use this API to construct an electrical equivalent of a specified subsystem of the working case (activity EEQV). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = eeqv(sid, all, status, dval)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of six elements specifying They are used to control equivalencing options. A value of 0 means the option is not enabled. A value of 1 means the option is enabled. (input).

parameters.name: dval
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying (input).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: retain area boundary buses (0 by default).
retain zone boundary buses (0 by default).
suppress the equivalencing option for phase shifters (0 by default).
retain existing branches between retained buses (0 by default).
net load and shunt at retained buses (0 by default).

dval.description: minimum active or reactive power generation for retaining generator buses (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
